holdings.infoBox: QQQH is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.98%, Apple at 6.89%, Micron Technology at 4.92%, Microsoft at 4.66%, and Amazon.com at 4.14%.

overview.description: The NEOS Nasdaq 100 Hedged Equity Income ETF (QQQH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of stocks included in the Nasdaq-100 Index combined with an options collar. The fund seeks to generate current income with some downside protection. QQQH was launched on Dec 19, 2019 and is issued by Neos.
